sources.notes: Choose bounded card counts b_i with total at most k to maximize the sum of prefix maxima.
Official editorial/commentary describes DP on total used cards and current last nonzero maximum, with Li Chao/CHT optimization for the stronger bound.

annotation.summary: Choose b_i <= a_i and total sum <= k to maximize the total of prefix maximums over all positions.
annotation.constraints: n is large but k is small/moderate, so the optimization should be over card values and total budget rather than over all positions and choices.
annotation.core_idea: For every possible value y, only its first feasible position p_y where a_i >= y matters; setting a new maximum y at p_y increases all suffix prefix-max values by y minus the previous maximum. This yields a DP over total spent and previous/current maximum value, and the optimized form treats transitions as maximum of lines.
annotation.complexity: O(n + k^3) for the direct DP; O(n + k^2 log k) with Li Chao tree optimization.
tricks: first feasible position for each value
DP over values instead of positions
suffix contribution of raising prefix maximum

solution_variants.name: value-budget-dp
solution_variants.summary: Let pos[y] be the first index with a_i >= y and do DP by used budget and current maximum value.

solution_variants.name: li-chao-optimized-dp
solution_variants.summary: Rewrite transitions as max of linear functions and optimize each budget layer with a Li Chao tree.

tags.evidence: The main solution is a budget/value DP maximizing accumulated prefix-maximum contribution.
Adding a new maximum y contributes (n - pos[y] + 1) * (y - previous maximum) to the objective.
The optimized DP transition is rewritten as a maximum of lines.
tags.description: Dynamic programming optimized by convex hull trick, Li Chao tree, or equivalent max/min of linear functions.
tags.created_reason: This DP optimization is useful to search separately from ordinary DP.

tags.evidence: The optimized variant uses Li Chao trees to maintain transition lines.
tags.description: Li Chao segment tree for dynamic maximum/minimum queries over lines.
tags.created_reason: Li Chao tree is a specific searchable data structure, distinct from generic data-structure tags.
